headline: ServiceNow And Aiva Bring Voice AI Deeper Into Hospital Workflows
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) is partnering with Aiva Health to bring real-time, voice-driven AI to the patient bedside. The collaboration integrates Aiva's voice interface with ServiceNow's AI platform so frontline healthcare workers can manage IT and operational requests by voice. The combined solution is designed to streamline clinical and operational workflows without disrupting clinical routines and aims to set a new reference point for healthcare AI. headline: Cohesity and ServiceNow Deliver Real-Time Recovery for Enterprise AI Agents
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., March 10, 2026--Cohesity, the leader in AI-powered data security, and ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW), the AI control tower for business reinvention, today announced a strategic partnership to deliver agent resilience, enabling organizations to build, operate, and safeguard autonomous AI agents and data with enterprise-grade reliability.

headline: Nvidia Invests In Mira Murati's AI Startup Thinking Machines
